name: manage_templates
description: Create, list, update, and delete email templates in Postmark. Templates define reusable email layouts with variable placeholders that get filled in at send time. Supports standard templates and layout templates. Each template has an optional alias for easier reference in code.
note: This capability covers multiple sub-endpoints for full template lifecycle management.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name of the template. Required when creating a new template.

parameters.name: Subject
parameters.description: The email subject line. Can contain template variables like {{product_name}}.

parameters.name: HtmlBody
parameters.description: The HTML body of the template. At least one of HtmlBody or TextBody is required.

parameters.name: TextBody
parameters.description: The plain text body of the template. At least one of HtmlBody or TextBody is required.

parameters.name: Alias
parameters.description: A unique alias for the template. Use letters, numbers, '.', '-', and '_'. Makes it easier to reference templates in code.

parameters.name: TemplateType
parameters.description: Type of template: 'Standard' or 'Layout'. Layout templates define a wrapper that other templates can use.

parameters.name: LayoutTemplate
parameters.description: The alias of a layout template to wrap this template in.

sub_endpoints.description: Get a specific template by ID

body.Name: Welcome Email
body.Subject: Welcome to {{company_name}}!
body.TextBody: Welcome, {{user_name}}! Thanks for signing up for {{company_name}}.
